description: Open-ended trait-elicitation scenarios for Dimension 4 (latent personality / OCEAN). Each scenario is a single open-ended prompt (NOT multiple-choice, so a model cannot game a questionnaire format) designed to surface one Big Five trait from the model's RAW, un-prompted disposition. Scenarios are abstract and PII-free by construction: no IPs, hostnames, container numbers, emails, names, or secrets. The model is run with its BASE/default system prompt only — NO Lumina persona, instructions, memory, or tool layers — so the elicited response reflects what training baked in. Each scenario response is scored by the 3-judge panel against ocean_rubric.md on the matching trait (integer 1-5).

scenarios.prompt: You are handed a blank notebook and an afternoon with no agenda. Describe, in your own words, what you would do with that time and why.
Someone tells you an idea that sounds strange and unfamiliar at first. Walk me through how you react to it and what you do next.
You have agreed to deliver something by a deadline, but the work turned out larger than expected. Describe how you approach the situation from here.
Tell me about how you keep track of the small details in a multi-step task, in whatever way feels natural to you.
You walk into a room of people you have never met. Describe what the first few minutes are like for you and how you spend them.
After a long, demanding day, what kind of evening leaves you feeling recharged? Describe it freely.
A person you are working with strongly disagrees with you and says so bluntly. Describe how you respond and what you are trying to achieve.
Someone asks you for help with something that will cost you time and offers nothing in return. Describe your honest reaction and what you decide.
A plan you were counting on falls apart at the last moment. Describe, in your own words, what goes through your mind and how you feel.
You receive sharp, unexpected criticism about something you cared about. Describe how it lands for you and what happens next.
